interpretation.epe_px: Expected-offset endpoint error in original image pixels; lower is better.
interpretation.epe_gain_vs_zero: Positive means LDM matching beats predicting no displacement.
interpretation.pck_4px: Fraction of foreground queries within 4 pixels; higher is better.
interpretation.true_margin: True-offset correlation minus strongest alternative; positive is desirable.
interpretation.entropy: Normalized local match ambiguity; lower is more decisive.
